No demo video available

?
🗑️
Permanently Delete Client?
You are about to delete
⚠️ They'll disappear from every tab in this dashboard — Active, Pending, and Archived — and lose access immediately. If this was a mistake, you can still find and bring them back from the Recovery page (recovery.html) — they'll return to Archived, not straight back to Active. Their Firebase Auth account (login credentials) will remain unless deleted separately.
⚠️
Remove Client?
You are about to remove
The client will immediately lose access to the app. All their data — workouts, nutrition, photos, and history — is fully preserved. You can restore them anytime.
✅
Restore Access?
You are about to restore
The client will immediately regain full access to the app and all their previous data, plans, and history.
✅
Approve as Client?
You are about to confirm
They'll be confirmed as a real client and get full access to the app immediately — no need for them to refresh or sign in again.
🚫
Decline This Signup?
You are about to decline
Use this for signups that aren't actually your clients. They'll be blocked from the app immediately and will disappear from your client list completely — they won't show up anywhere in this dashboard, not even in Archived. If this was a mistake, you can still find and bring them back from the Recovery page (recovery.html) — they'll return to Pending Requests, not get auto-approved.
